rationale_overall: Stand at 2023-06-30 close. Basket is AT cap=8 (MSFT, GOOGL, NVDA, ISRG, URA, RKLB, IONQ, LLY) with one ticker per named profile wave bucket and every slot showing a fresh Q2-2023 pre-date catalyst supporting hold; no swap candidate clears the bar of displacing an in-thesis name at the cap. Wave-by-wave review: (1) NVDA -- single largest catalyst of the quarter: Q1 FY24 print on 2023-05-24 reported record Data Center revenue of $4.28B and guided Q2 FY24 revenue to $11.0B +/- 2% (https://nvidianews.nvidia.com/news/nvidia-announces-financial-results-for-first-quarter-fiscal-2024), an unambiguous AI-buildup inflection; Computex keynote 2023-05-29 expanded the data-center accelerator narrative. (2) MSFT -- Microsoft Build 2023 (2023-05-23) announced Windows Copilot and broad Azure OpenAI Service availability; commercial AI monetization path concretizing on top of the January multi-billion OpenAI investment. (3) GOOGL -- Google I/O 2023-05-10 launched PaLM 2 across Bard, Workspace, and Search Generative Experience, with Bard removed from waitlist and expanded to 180 countries (https://blog.google/technology/ai/google-bard-updates-io-2023/); credible AI-platform response intact. (4) ISRG -- Q1 2023 earnings 2023-04-18: worldwide da Vinci procedures +26% YoY, instruments and accessories revenue $986M +22% YoY, beat consensus; hard procedure cadence sustains the robotics slot over speculative humanoid alternatives. (5) URA -- uranium spot held ~$54-56/lb through Q2 2023 with the contracting cycle accelerating (Sprott Q2 commentary cites stars-aligning thesis), Cameco-Brookfield Westinghouse closing process ongoing, REPowerEU + Japan restart demand thesis intact; 2022 rerating not retraced. (6) RKLB -- Q2 2023 delivered three successful Electron launches including the first HASTE hypersonic-testbed mission, completed Neutron second-stage qualification tank, and on 2023-05-23 acquired Virgin Orbit's Long Beach HQ and production assets for ~$16.1M to accelerate Neutron build-out (Rocket Lab 8-K, https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/0001819994/000095017023019699/rklb-ex99_1.htm); execution cadence and Neutron path on schedule. (7) IONQ -- Q1 2023 update: 29 algorithmic qubits achieved on IonQ Forte, IonQ Aria 2 construction complete and joining the public cloud, next milestone 35 AQ; sole quantum slot in a named next-wave bucket, no pre-date thesis break. (8) LLY -- SURMOUNT-2 Phase 3 topline 2023-04-27 (https://investor.lilly.com/news-releases/news-release-details/lillys-tirzepatide-achieved-157-weight-loss-adults-obesity-or) showed tirzepatide 15.7% weight loss at 15mg in T2D-obesity patients, FDA submission for chronic weight management filed in coming weeks, regulatory action expected late 2023; GLP-1/GIP demographics thesis materially accelerated within the quarter (classical peptide pharma, not synbio). Considered and rejected: adding AAPL on WWDC 2023-06-05 Vision Pro reveal -- would crowd the AI bucket (already at 3/4 with MSFT/GOOGL/NVDA), Vision Pro is a 2024-launch hardware story not a 2023 AI catalyst, and at cap=8 the swap would displace an in-thesis name. Considered and rejected: adding AMD on the 2023-06-13 MI300X data-center event (https://www.amd.com/en/newsroom/press-releases/2023-6-13-amd-expands-leadership-data-center-portfolio-with-.html) -- adds a fourth AI-chip-correlated name to the AI bucket (saturating at the 4-ticker bucket guardrail), and NVDA's Q1 FY24 guide already delivers the AI-chip exposure cleanly; reject as redundant. Considered and rejected: adding TSLA on Optimus AI-training-compute scale-up -- ISRG already holds robotics with proven hard cadence, humanoid program still pre-revenue. Considered and rejected: adding NuScale/SMR or BWXT -- URA already holds nuclear and is a diversified utility/miner ETF; single-name SMR pre-revenue concentration is the wrong shape at cap=8. Considered and rejected: trimming MSFT/GOOGL/NVDA on Nasdaq-100 +32% YTD concentration risk and the announced 2023-07-24 special-rebalance preview -- no per-name thesis breach, the optimizer's max_weight=0.5 plus mean-variance variance penalty already moderates concentration, and reactive trimming on a one-quarter rally against accelerating AI fundamentals (NVDA $11B Q2 FY24 guide) is the wrong direction. Considered and rejected: trimming IONQ on continued quantum-sector weakness -- sole quantum exposure in a named next-wave bucket, profile horizon is long, no pre-date catalyst break. Post-decision basket remains AT cap=8 and unchanged: MSFT, GOOGL, NVDA, ISRG, URA, RKLB, IONQ, LLY.
self_critique: Stand at 2023-06-30 close. Pre-date events referenced: NVDA Q1 FY24 print and $11B Q2 FY24 guide (2023-05-24), MSFT Build 2023 Windows Copilot + Azure OpenAI Service GA (2023-05-23), Google I/O PaLM 2 / Bard expansion (2023-05-10), ISRG Q1 2023 earnings da Vinci +26% YoY (2023-04-18), Q2 2023 uranium spot ~$54-56/lb and Sprott Q2 commentary, RKLB Q2 Electron + HASTE cadence, RKLB Virgin Orbit asset purchase (2023-05-23), RKLB Neutron second-stage qual tank Q2, IONQ Q1 2023 29 AQ on Forte and Aria 2 build, LLY SURMOUNT-2 topline (2023-04-27), AAPL WWDC Vision Pro reveal (2023-06-05), AMD MI300X data-center event (2023-06-13), Nasdaq-100 special-rebalance announcement (mid-June 2023; effective 2023-07-24). Constraints satisfied: 0 adds + 0 removes (within 3/3 cap), basket stays AT cap=8 unchanged, no engineered_biology proposed (LLY is classical peptide pharma, not synbio; no ARKG/NTLA/CRSP/EDIT/BEAM), no_changes:true allowed by harness, wave-bucket diversity preserved (3 AI, 1 each robotics/nuclear/rockets/quantum/demographics, no bucket over 4).
